---
title: "firstValueFrom()"
description: "Resolve the first DATA from a Node as a Promise. This is a host-boundary escape hatch, not a graph operator; do not call it from reactive node bodies. ERROR rejects, and COMPLETE before DATA rejects because no value exists."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Resolve the first DATA from a Node as a Promise. This is a host-boundary escape hatch, not a
graph operator; do not call it from reactive node bodies. ERROR rejects, and COMPLETE before DATA
rejects because no value exists.

## Import

```ts
import { firstValueFrom } from "@graphrefly/ts/sources/browser";
```

## Signature

```ts
function firstValueFrom(source: Node<T>): Promise<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `source` | `Node<T>` | Missing @param source JSDoc. |

## Returns

`Promise<T>`
